title: Image Editor — layered raster editor
description: Embeddable, layer-based raster image editor (Konva): layers with blend modes + layer styles (shadow/glow/stroke), transforms, crop/resize/aspect presets, paint brushes, adjustments, text layers with fonts, free in-browser background removal (@imgly), PNG/JPEG/WebP export, an AI function-calling command registry (every operation is a schema'd command) with in-editor chat, and a headless server barrel (server.ts) to run commands against documents without a DOM.
